title: HofferRuffer Candle Holders Set of 3,Glass Votive Tealight Holders for Taper/Pillar/Tealight Candles,Candlesticks for Table Centerpiece, Wedding,Birthday,Gifts（Grey）
features: 【Taper Glass Candle Holder】Modern tapered glass candle holder has a chic shape, 2-in-1 design candle holder for different types of candles that on the narrow side you can hold taper candles.
【Tealight Candle Holders】Our tea light candle holder has very thick vertical stripes glass walls for durability and can hold tea lights / columns / floating candles.

【Pillar Candle Holder】 The elegant pillar candle holders are made of high quality lead-free glass, non-toxic, odorless and environmentally friendly. Its weight is large enough to ensure that it will never tip over when the candles are placed in it.

【Decorative Candle Stand】Ideal for home, table, living room, dining room, wedding, Valentine's Day, indoor/outdoor party, Christmas decoration, etc. Also a good choice as a gift for your family or friends.
【24H Support】 We're just a message away! Contact us if your glass product arrives damaged during shipping, and we'll swiftly resolve it within 24 hours. Your satisfaction is our priority.
description: Product Description HofferRuffer Glass Candle Holders 2-in-1 for Taper/Tealight Candle Candlestick holders set is a perfect way to add warmth & beauty to your home's decor. For wedding, home decoration, Christmas decor, Thanksgiving decoration, valentine romantic atmosphere or as gift, etc. 2-in-1 Glass Candle Holders 3 Pack SIZE S:3.2*6.2*5cm/1.3*2.4*2in M:3.2*4.4*6.8cm/1.3*1.7*2.7in L:3.2*5*6.8cm/1.3*1.95*2.7in Inside Diameter: S:2.4-5.5cm/M:2.4-4.2cm/L:2.4-5cm 2 WAY USE 2-in-1 design candle holders for various types of candles. You can hold tealight /pillar/ floating candles in the wide side or holder taper candles in the narrower side.
